title: Munde Kamaal De
overview: Munde Kamaal De is an upcoming Punjabi comedy film directed by Amit Prasher and written by Naresh Kathuria. The film is produced by Prem Parkash Gupta with Starring Amrinder Gill, Yuvraj Hans, Binnu Dhillon and Mandy Takhar in the lead.
